title: Lava Replacement Helmet
description:
Lava Replacement Pack. Whilst wearing "Lava Bane Helm" any nearby lava around you will be replaced with air. This will remove Lava pockets in the Nether, as well as entire Lava Lakes.

Now updated so less likely to take damage...and more efficient.
body:
**Pack Purpose**
This pack will add the "Lava Bane Helm" to the game.

While wearing this helmet any lava within a short area either to the side or above you, will be replaced with air!

This will prevent lava pockets in the Nether dropping on your head. It will stop lava streams hitting you from above. It will allow you to descend into lava pools, though you may take fire damage. The helm has limited protection and fire resistance.

This is initial Alpha version! This was done in around 30 minutes, and is not finished...

A better version of this pack will be used for teaching children basic data pack coding. It will be used as an example on how to create custom items and effects. This is kept very very basic and simple for this reason. This pack is not yet at this stage, and is rough. Tutorial videos and instructions on how to amend this pack, and create your own customised items and weapons will be released in future, once this is tidied up.

**Notes / What This Pack Is Not (Or Not Yet)**

We will add the ability to replace anything, everything, or 2 particular specified block types. If you want full customisation, that will require our other unreleased database packs and framework...but is being worked on.

The ability to amend the range and upgrade the Helm is not yet implemented.

**Notes / What's Not Tested / Potential Bugs / Work In Progress**

This has not fully been tested for multiplayer though should work. Changes have been made to make it less costly and it looks to work fine.

The manual and commands will not currently work without creative mode/administrator. ANd manual has been removed for v1.21 due to issues with new formatr. We have a fix for this...

This pack has been separated from our other packs. Although it should integrate with our other packs it uses simpler non-standard method we are moving away from. This has been simplified to make it stand alone.

This runs every tick, which is not ideal and costly. If diving in lava pools this is required, or recommended. If you just want this to remove Lava Pockets, a more efficient and less costly method is incoming.

**Instructions**

There is no install or uninstall for this (in Alpha). As it is simplified deliberately there are no scoreboards, database entries, global variables. This may change in later versions.

**Steps To Install & Update**

Back up your game save!!!

Drop the folder "mxlava" in the datapack folder for your game save. For example:
```
C:\Users\[UserName]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\[savegamename]\datapacks\mxlava
```
Reload your save using this command:
```
/reload
```
NOTE MANUAL NOT WORKING IN V07 SO HAS BEEN REMOVED.
If for any reason you don't receive the manual you can type:
```
/function mxlava:man
```
If you want to be given the helm:
```
/function mxlava:lavahelm
```

Place the helm on your head to activate, remove it to de-activate.

This is very early version, with limited functionality.

**External Links:**

[Miscreat Website](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/ 'miscreat.co.uk')

[GitHub](https://github.com/MxSxC1/mxlava)

We do not create mods, we create packs and data packs within Mojang framework, and which will work on Realms.

Never install any packs, mods, or anything without fully understanding what they do, and ensuring it's legitimate and safe! If anything requires elevation (which ours do not), think twice and verify!

The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow
